name: Spiral-Wrapped Grilled Vegetable Tortilla Sandwiches
recipeIngredient: salt and freshly ground black pepper
assortment of grilled thinly sliced vegetables (such as red bell peppers, zucchini, eggplant)
4 thin slices Italian fontina cheese (up to 6)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor or blender, puree together the mayonnaise, vinegar, garlic, and basil leaves until smooth. Season to taste with salt and freshly ground black pepper.
2. Place a tortilla on a flat surface and spread evenly with the basil mayonnaise mixture.
3. Arrange 1 or 2 layers of the grilled vegetables over the tortilla.
4. Sprinkle with 1/4 cup of the fontina cheese.
5. Tightly roll up the tortilla and secure with a toothpick.
6. Cut into 4 pieces.
7. Repeat steps 2-6 for the remaining tortilla and vegetables.
8. Yield: 2 servings
